title: Remove obsolete skips
body:
The following bugs seem to be fixed:

* #6510 (e2e tests) - podman rmi gives "layer not known"

* #9915 (buildah-bud tests) - podman build --arch

* #10248 - spurious warning from first-ever invocation
  of rootless podman

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *edsantiago*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [edsantiago,rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

Oops, I jumped the gun. Fix for #10248 is in containers/storage v1.30.2, which had not actually merged into podman at the time I submitted (PR #10290 was still in review). That PR is now merged, I've rebased & pushed.
